features.name: class_with_string_member
features.description: Code should include a SystemVerilog class declaration containing a string-typed member variable.

features.name: class_with_queue_member
features.description: Code should include a SystemVerilog class declaration containing a queue-typed member variable.

features.name: class_new_constructor_declaration
features.description: Code should include a class constructor declared as new() inside a SystemVerilog class.

features.name: class_new_expression_instantiation
features.description: Code should include a class instantiation using the new expression outside the class body.

features.name: class_new_with_unsupported_string_member
features.description: Code should include a SystemVerilog class containing a string member, a new() constructor, and an external instantiation with new.

features.name: class_new_with_unsupported_queue_member
features.description: Code should include a SystemVerilog class containing a queue member, a new() constructor, and an external instantiation with new.

features.name: interface declaration with signal member
features.description: Code should include an interface declaration containing at least one logic signal member that can be referenced via dotted access

features.name: interface instantiation inside named generate block
features.description: Code should include an interface instantiated with empty parentheses inside a named generate block (begin : block_name)

metadata.snippet:
generate
    if (1) begin : my_gen
        my_intf my_intf();
    end
endgenerate

features.name: dotted access to interface signal inside named generate block
features.description: Code should include dotted access to an interface signal where the interface instance resides inside a named generate block

features.name: interface passed as module port from named generate block
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation that receives an interface as a port connection where the interface instance is declared inside a named generate block

features.name: generate for loop with genvar declaration
features.description: Code should include a generate for loop that declares and uses a genvar variable as the iteration index

metadata.snippet:
genvar loop1;
generate
  for (loop1 = 0; loop1 < 4; loop1 = loop1 + 1) begin
  end
endgenerate

features.name: nested generate for loops
features.description: Code should include nested generate for loops where an outer generate for loop contains an inner generate for loop

metadata.snippet:
genvar loop1, loop2;
generate
  for (loop1 = 0; loop1 < 4; loop1 = loop1 + 1) begin
    for (loop2 = 0; loop2 < 4; loop2 = loop2 + 1) begin
    end
  end
endgenerate

features.name: genvar as index in hierarchical attribute access
features.description: Code should include a generate for loop whose genvar variable is used as an index inside a hierarchical reference or attribute access expression

features.name: indexed hierarchical access via dot operator in generate loop
features.description: Code should include an indexed array or interface element accessed via a dot member operator using a genvar as part of the index expression inside a generate loop

features.name: package_localparam_non_trivial_expr
features.description: Code should include a package containing a localparam initialized with a non-trivial constant expression such as a shift operation.

features.name: wildcard_package_import
features.description: Code should include a wildcard import statement that imports all identifiers from a package into the current scope.

metadata.snippet: import foo::*;

features.name: const_function_cross_package_localparam
features.description: Code should include a constant function whose return value references a localparam defined in an imported package.

features.name: localparam_init_by_const_function_call
features.description: Code should include a localparam initialized by calling a constant function with a constant argument.

metadata.snippet: localparam BAZ = f('0);

features.name: package_localparam_bit_shift_expr
features.description: Code should include a localparam inside a package whose value is defined using a bitwise shift operation on an integer literal.

metadata.snippet: localparam FOO = 256 >> 2;

features.name: constant_function_returning_imported_param
features.description: Code should include a constant function that returns a value derived solely from a package-imported localparam, without taking any arguments.

features.name: localparam_const_function_with_unsized_literal_arg
features.description: Code should include a localparam initialized by a constant function call that passes an unsized literal such as '0 as the argument.

metadata.snippet: localparam BAZ = f('0);

features.name: cross_package_localparam_constify
features.description: Code should include a module that imports a package via wildcard import, then references the imported localparam inside a constant function used for localparam initialization.

features.name: generate_for_labeled_block
features.description: Code should include a generate for loop with a labeled begin block to create an array of generated scopes.

features.name: dotted_reference_generated_array_scope
features.description: Code should include a dotted hierarchical reference that indexes into a labeled generate for block to access a signal inside the generated scope.

metadata.snippet: bar.foo.my_gen_block[0].baz = 1;

features.name: multi_level_module_instantiation
features.description: Code should include a chain of module instantiations forming a multi-level hierarchy where an intermediate module instantiates another module.

features.name: signal_inside_labeled_generate_block
features.description: Code should include a signal declaration inside a labeled generate for block so that the signal exists within each generated scope instance.

features.name: initial_block_hierarchical_access
features.description: Code should include an initial statement that performs a hierarchical dotted reference to assign or read a signal deep in the instance tree.

metadata.snippet: initial bar.foo.my_gen_block[0].baz = 1;

features.name: unpacked-array-of-interfaces
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array of interface instances declared with a parameterized or constant size range.

features.name: interface-array-element-access-by-index
features.description: Code should include indexing into an unpacked interface array using a non-constant expression (e.g., a function call) to access a specific interface instance.

features.name: interface-array-element-signal-access
features.description: Code should include hierarchical signal access into an interface array element via dot notation after array indexing.

features.name: interface-array-element-port-connection
features.description: Code should include passing an indexed interface array element as an actual argument to a module instance port that expects an interface.

features.name: interface-array-element-port-connection-constant-index
features.description: Code should include passing an interface array element accessed with a constant index as an actual argument to a module port.

features.name: bare_named_begin_end_at_module_scope
features.description: Code should include a named begin/end block placed directly at module scope without any procedural context such as initial or always, using the prefix label syntax (label: begin ... end)

features.name: prefix_label_on_begin_end_block
features.description: Code should include a begin/end block using the prefix label syntax (label: begin) rather than the suffix form (begin : label), placed inside a procedural context

metadata.snippet:
initial
    blk_label: begin
        logic [3:0] v = 4'd0;
    end

features.name: named_block_with_local_declarations
features.description: Code should include a named begin/end block containing local variable declarations, using the suffix label form (begin : label) inside a procedural block

features.name: binary_misuse_of_unary_reduction_nor
features.description: Code should include the unary reduction NOR operator ~| used incorrectly as a binary infix operator between two multi-bit operands

features.name: binary_misuse_of_unary_reduction_nand
features.description: Code should include the unary reduction NAND operator ~& used incorrectly as a binary infix operator between two multi-bit operands

features.name: unary_reduction_nor_correct_usage
features.description: Code should include the unary reduction NOR operator ~| applied to a single multi-bit operand producing a one-bit result

features.name: unary_reduction_nand_correct_usage
features.description: Code should include the unary reduction NAND operator ~& applied to a single multi-bit operand producing a one-bit result

features.name: reduction_operator_in_continuous_assign
features.description: Code should include a unary reduction operator applied to a multi-bit vector within a continuous assign statement
